headline: Is Coinbase Global (COIN) Pricing In Too Much Optimism After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Coinbase Global's share price still reflects its true value, or if recent crypto excitement has already been fully priced in. The stock closed at US$161.14, with a 7 day return of an 18.4% decline, a 30 day return of an 8.4% decline, a year to date return of a 31.9% decline and a 1 year return of a 7.4% decline, set against a 3 year gain of 138.5%. These moves have unfolded alongside ongoing debate about crypto regulation in the US and the broader role of...
